title: tephroseris heterophylla
intro: Tephroseris heterophylla, also known as the Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tephroseris heterophylla include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antimicrobial agent to fight off infections. Tephroseris heterophylla can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
